name: libnet-ident-perl
title: libnet-ident-perl
summary: Perl module to lookup the username on the remote end of a TCP/IP connection
description:
Perl module to lookup the username on the remote end of a TCP/IP connection
Net::Ident is a Perl module implementing the RFC1413 Identification Protocol,
also known as "ident".
.
It provides both a simple interface for doing one ident lookup at a time, and
an asynchronous interface to perform (possibly) many simultaneous lookups, or
simply continue serving other things while the lookup is proceeding.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libnet-ident-perl because Perl module to lookup the username on the remote end of a TCP/IP connection.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libnet-ident-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libnet-ident-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libnet-ident-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
